description: Lock the early-socialist-theories source-check pass to an 1830 political-movement scope and removed labor-union dependency.

checks.reason: The Socialism (Early Theories) node is anchored to Britannica's statement that socialist terminology came into use about 1830.
The current 1799 Labor Unions & Collective Bargaining node predates the source-backed 1830 Socialism (Early Theories) node.
